base_prompt: INSERT YOUR PRODUCT HERE presented within a high-resolution luxury retail architectural interior, 20mm rectilinear wide-angle lens, f/8 aperture, ISO 200 equivalent digital capture, zero visible luminance noise, concealed LED cove perimeter uplighting with recessed downlight array producing soft omnidirectional near-shadowless mid-field fill, tungsten-balanced accent spotlighting delivering warm key illumination at 3200K color temperature, champagne ivory and warm travertine sand architectural surfaces, caramel amber and gilded ochre material accents, brushed gold metalwork and polished onyx detail surfaces, luminous incandescent bloom halating from ceiling cove sources across lacquered and stone surfaces, lifted blacks with fully preserved shadow texture and zero crushed tones, gentle specular highlight rolloff on all metallic and resin surfaces, hyper-controlled highlight recovery in blown specular zones, micro-reflection suppression on glass showcases and polished resin flooring, atmospheric tonal depth through glazed partitions and enfilade archways producing receding warm tonal planes, restrained midtone saturation, clean tonal transitions throughout frame, commercial architectural editorial photography for luxury maison, precision tonal management, dusty terracotta rose and warm sand ambient palette

view_variants.wide: 16mm rectilinear wide-angle, f/11, infinite depth-of-field, full architectural spatial context, enfilade recession into background tonal planes, visible ceiling cove lighting system, mirror-polished floor plane reflection dissolving lower third, atmospheric layering through successive archways and glazed partitions, champagne ivory wall surfaces flanking frame edges
view_variants.closeup: 105mm macro-telephoto compression, f/2.8, razor-thin depth-of-field plane, creamy out-of-focus highlight bokeh discs in background, single-spot nadir key light raking across surface texture, extreme material grain and surface topography isolation, tonally graduated near-black background vignette with lifted shadow floor, specular highlight rolloff across product surface edges
view_variants.medium: 35mm rectilinear, f/5.6, product at phi-ratio frame position, warm travertine surface plane as base, soft overhead cove fill, lifted cast shadow with preserved ambient detail, gilded amber accent surface interaction in background field, product occupying 40–60% of frame height
view_variants.interior: 24mm rectilinear, f/8, full luxury retail spatial immersion, saturated monochromatic volumetric color wash flooding entire frame — crimson scarlet or deep cobalt indigo dominant channel, mirror-floor infinity plane reflection collapsing architectural geometry, near-black crushed shadow fields at frame periphery, full-saturation theatrical ambient eliminating mid-tones, product isolated as tonal anchor within chromatic abstraction

negative_prompt: visible luminance noise, ISO grain, film grain overlay, chromatic aberration, barrel distortion, lens vignette clipping, crushed shadow detail, blown specular highlights without recovery, HDR halo fringing, exposure bracketing artifacts, ring flash catchlights, umbrella diffusion, white seamless cyc background, product floating on white, harsh directional cast shadows, colored gel light sources visible in frame, oversaturated midtone palette, desaturated matte grade, plastic surface sheen, cheap laminate materials, JPEG compression blocking, watermark, text, signature, frame border, AI duplication artifacts, warped rectilinear architecture, converging verticals, depth-of-field blur across hero product in wide register, motion blur, posterization, banding in tonal gradients, overexposed ambient blowout, flat clinical overlit uniformity in warm register shots
